---
applyTo: "backend/**,frontend/src/features/kio/**,.ai/docs/项目计划.md"
---

Read `AGENTS.md`, `MEMORY.md`, and `.ai/instructions/kio-domain.md` before editing KIO behavior.

Rules:
- Preserve all original CSV fields.
- Batch operations require preview and scope.
- BIT addresses increment through bit 0-7 then byte +1.
- Update `MEMORY.md` after meaningful domain changes.
